title: NewBack
description: A simple plugin that allows players to return to their last death location using /back
body:
# NewBack Plugin  

A powerful, configurable **/back** plugin for Minecraft Paper‚ÄØ1.21 (and newer) that lets players instantly return to a previously recorded death location. Built with modular managers and extensive options, NewBack offers safety‚Äëchecked teleportation, cooldowns, XP costs, location history, and full admin control.

## Key Features  

- **Death‚ÄëLocation Tracking** ‚Äì Automatically saves the exact coordinates of each death.  
- **Location History** ‚Äì Stores up to **5** recent death points per player, enabling multiple ‚Äúback‚Äù attempts.  
- **Configurable Cooldown** ‚Äì Prevents abuse with a default **60‚ÄØs** wait time (customizable).  
- **XP Cost Option** ‚Äì Can charge a configurable number of XP levels before teleporting.  
- **Teleport Delay & Safety** ‚Äì A default **3‚Äësecond** delay that cancels automatically if the player moves or takes damage.  
- **Admin Commands**  
  - `/back reload` ‚Äì Reloads the plugin configuration on the fly.  
  - `/back clear <player>` ‚Äì Clears a specific player‚Äôs death‚Äëlocation history.  
- **Customizable Messages & Color Codes** ‚Äì All user‚Äëfacing texts are editable in `config.yml` and support `&` color codes.  
- **Bypass Permissions** ‚Äì Admins can ignore cooldowns and XP costs (`newback.bypass.cooldown`, `newback.bypass.cost`).  
- **Specialized Managers** ‚Äì Clean architecture with `CooldownManager`, `TeleportManager`, `ConfigManager`, and `DeathLocationManager`.  
- **Full Compatibility** ‚Äì Works with Paper‚ÄØ1.21, Java‚ÄØ21, and earlier 1.20.4 builds.  

## Permissions  

| Permission | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `newback.use` | Allows the player to use the `/back` command. |
| `newback.admin` | Grants access to admin commands (`/back reload`, `/back clear`). |
| `newback.bypass.cooldown` | Skips the cooldown timer. |
| `newback.bypass.cost` | Skips the XP cost. |
